body: Heads up: ran graphify extract on the codebase. Actual graph.json schema differs from our GraphDataSchema in src/core/graph.ts. Real graph uses: node.file_type (not .type), node.source_file (not .file), node.label (display name), edge.relation (not .type), edge.confidence (EXTRACTED/INFERRED), edge.context (not .label). Example: {id, label, file_type, source_file, source_location, _origin}. The zod schema in graph.ts needs a remapping layer to accept real Graphify output. Graph built successfully: 1058 nodes, 2361 edges, ~1MB.
